events.title: Community Care Night: Fat Figure Drawing
events.description: Fat figure drawing, drinks, and connection before the opening night of Make Space, a group exhibition celebrating fat artists and creators. Bring your own materials (very limited amount provided).

events.title: Evening Figure Drawing
events.description: Figure Drawing sessions every second Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2.5 hours. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18. Chairs provided; bring your own drawing materials/board/easel.

events.title: Morning Figure Drawing at Artspace on June 16, 2026
events.description: Figure Drawing sessions every third Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2 hours. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18. Chairs provided; bring your own drawing materials/board/easel.

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: June Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18 and over. June session is a short pose session featuring a single model — ideal for fast, gestural sketches. Tickets required; no door tickets. 18+ only with valid photo ID required.

events.title: Figure Drawing Open Studio
events.description: Open figure drawing with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Artists of all levels welcome. Bring your own drawing materials; tables and chairs provided. No registration required.

events.title: The Alchemy Of Expression: Portrait Sculpture Workshop
events.description: Two-week portrait sculpture workshop (July 13-17 and July 20-24, 2026). Instructed by Constance Bowden using Classical Realism methods. Covers skull anatomy, muscles, cartilage, fat pads, and portrait from life. Days 4-10 working from a live model. All materials and model fees included. All skill levels welcome. Register via Zelle to ConstanceBowden@yahoo.com.

events.title: Drawn to Life: A Crash Course on Life Drawing
events.description: All-ages crash course on life drawing covering techniques for drawing from life and the human figure. Includes a presentation, break, and guided figure drawing session with a live clothed model. Hosted by resident tattoo artist Liam Williams. Tickets required; no door tickets.

events.title: Figure Drawing Open Studio
events.description: Open figure drawing with a live model in a relaxed, supportive environment. Artists of all levels welcome. Bring your own drawing materials; tables and chairs provided. No registration required.
